examples: And slept in the portico of the temple where you would gladly have sheltered me.
Splendid carriages would draw up under the portico, and visitors would be constantly coming and going.
The first thing he did was create a proper entrance where a proper entrance should always have been: in the portico.
Hong Kong's Portico is located in a Citibank office block on the fringes of the Central financial district.
But try telling that to the ravers who pour out of Portico at six on a Sunday morning.
